source.title: Agentic Talk — Daniel Castillo Founder Series

clips.title: From Marine Filing Cabinets to AI Systems
clips.caption:
When I was 21 in the Marines, I walked into an office still using paper filing systems.

I digitized the entire unit's records — scanned every document, built a searchable system from scratch.

That was my first 'automation' project. No AI, no code. Just a kid who refused to do things the slow way.

Now I build AI systems that do it a thousand times faster.

🎯 The instinct hasn't changed — just the tools.

#GhostAI #Founder #USMC #Veteran #AIAutomation #Orlando
clips.hook: A 21-year-old Marine digitized an entire battalion's filing system. Now he builds AI.

clips.title: Inside the Ghost AI Command Center
clips.caption:
This is what a one-man AI agency looks like behind the scenes.

Multiple agents running 24/7. Voice bots answering phones. Content engines posting across platforms. Lead gen pipelines scoring and reaching out autonomously.

No massive team. No VC funding. Just systems.

This is what happens when you treat your business like infrastructure, not a hustle.

🔧 Built different.

#GhostAI #CommandCenter #AIAgency #Automation #TechFounder #Orlando
clips.hook: One person. Multiple AI agents. Zero employees. This is the command center.

clips.title: How MediaGeekz Runs on AI Systems
clips.caption:
MediaGeekz isn't just a video production company — it's a system.

Every quote, every follow-up, every piece of content runs through automated workflows.

Clients get instant quotes. AI generates follow-ups. Content gets distributed across platforms without me touching a button.

The camera work is human. Everything else? Machines.

🎬 That's how you scale a creative business.

#MediaGeekz #VideoProduction #AIAutomation #ContentCreator #Orlando #SystemsThinking
clips.hook: The camera work is human. Everything else runs on AI. Here's how.

clips.title: Why Every Plumber Needs an AI Voice Agent
clips.caption:
A plumber misses a call at 2 AM. That's a $500 emergency job gone.

Now imagine an AI answers that call, books the appointment, and texts the plumber the details — all while he's sleeping.

That's not science fiction. That's what we build at Ghost AI.

Local businesses are leaving thousands on the table because nobody picks up the phone.

📞 We fix that.

#GhostAI #VoiceAgent #Plumber #LocalBusiness #AIForBusiness #SmallBusiness
clips.hook: A plumber loses $500 every time he misses a 2 AM call. AI fixes that.

clips.title: We Made 100 Videos in One Month
clips.caption:
100 videos. One month. No burnout.

Here's how: AI handles scripting, captioning, scheduling, and distribution. I handle the camera and the ideas.

Most creators spend 80% of their time on post-production busywork. We automated all of it.

The result? More content, better quality, and I actually enjoy the process.

Stop grinding. Start building systems.

🎥 Content at scale.

#ContentCreation #100Videos #AIVideo #GhostAI #MediaGeekz #CreatorEconomy #Automation
clips.hook: 100 videos in 30 days. Zero burnout. Here's the system behind it.

clips.title: Building AI Infrastructure That Runs 24/7
clips.caption:
Most people use AI to write emails. We use AI to run businesses.

Voice agents answering calls. Lead gen bots scraping and scoring prospects. Content engines posting 3x/day across every platform. Sales pipelines that close deals while I sleep.

This isn't a side project — it's infrastructure. And it runs 24/7/365.

The question isn't 'should I use AI?' The question is 'what are you still doing manually?'

⚡ Build the machine.

#AIInfrastructure #GhostAI #Automation #TechFounder #AIAgency #BuildInPublic
clips.hook: Most people use AI to write emails. We use it to run entire businesses.
